# Samferdselsdepartementet

*31 lover*

| Lov | Korttittel | Ikrafttredelse | Historikk |
|-----|-----------|----------------|-----------|
| [Lov om Overenskomst om internasjonal jernbanetrafikk (COTIF-loven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2004-12-10-82.md) | COTIF-loven | 2004-12-10, 2006-07-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2004-12-10-82.md) |
| [Lov om anlegg og drift av jernbane, herunder sporvei, tunnelbane og forstadsbane](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1993-06-11-100.md) | Jernbaneloven – jbl | 1993-07-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1993-06-11-100.md) |
| [Lov om endringar i lov om Overenskomst om internasjonal jernbanetrafikk (COTIF-l](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2023-06-20-81.md) | Endringslov til COTIF-lova | Når endringer i overenskomst trer i kraft | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2023-06-20-81.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i lov 4. juli 2003 nr. 83 om elektronisk kommunikasjon (ekomlov](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2008-01-11-2.md) | Endringslov til ekomloven | Kongen bestemmer, 2008-01-15 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2008-01-11-2.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i veglova mv. (overføring av fylkesveiadministrasjon)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2019-06-21-68.md) | Endringslov til veglova mv. (overføring av fylkesveiadministrasjon) | 2019-06-21, 2020-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2019-06-21-68.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i vegtrafikkloven (opplæring)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2020-04-03-18.md) | Endringslov til vegtrafikkloven (opplæring) | 2020-04-03, Kongen bestemmer | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2020-04-03-18.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i yrkestransportloven mv. (drosjetilbud, internkontroll, kontro](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-06-20-111.md) | Endringslov til yrkestransportloven mv. | 2025-06-20, 2026-01-01, 2026-07-01, Kongen bestemmer | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2025-06-20-111.md) |
| [Lov om fornøyelsesinnretninger (tivoliloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2017-05-22-30.md) | Tivoliloven | 2017-07-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2017-05-22-30.md) |
| [Lov om gjennomføring av fellesregler om innenlands transport i EØS-avtalen](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1995-05-26-25.md) | Lov om innenlands transport i EØS-avtalen | 1995-05-26 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1995-05-26-25.md) |
| [Lov om infrastruktur for alternativt drivstoff](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2020-06-19-95.md) | Lov om infrastruktur for alternativt drivstoff | 2020-07-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2020-06-19-95.md) |
| [Lov om intelligente transportsystemer innenfor vegtransport m.m. (ITS-loven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2015-12-11-101.md) | ITS-loven | 2015-12-11 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2015-12-11-101.md) |
| [Lov om luftfart (luftfartsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1993-06-11-101.md) | Luftfartsloven – luftl | 1994-04-01, 1996-04-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1993-06-11-101.md) |
| [Lov om omdanning av Jernbaneverkets forretningsenhet BaneService til aksjeselska](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2005-01-07-5.md) | Lov om BaneService som AS | 2005-01-07 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2005-01-07-5.md) |
| [Lov om omdanning av Jernbaneverkets kommersielle televirksomhet til aksjeselskap](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2001-06-15-87.md) | Lov om BaneTele AS | 2001-06-15 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2001-06-15-87.md) |
| [Lov om omdanning av Kystverkets produksjonsvirksomhet til statsaksjeselskap](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2004-12-17-90.md) | Lov om Kystverkets produksjonsvirksomhet | 2004-12-17 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2004-12-17-90.md) |
| [Lov om omdanning av Luftfartsverket til aksjeselskap](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2002-12-13-85.md) | Lov om Statens lufthavnselskap | 2002-12-13, 2003-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2002-12-13-85.md) |
| [Lov om omdanning av Postbanken BA til aksjeselskap](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1999-06-18-42.md) | Lov om omdanning til Postbanken AS – Postbl | 1999-06-18, 1999-06-22 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1999-06-18-42.md) |
| [Lov om omdanning av Statens vegvesens produksjonsvirksomhet til statlig aksjesel](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2002-12-13-84.md) | Lov om statlig aksjeselskap for vegproduksjon | 2002-12-13 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2002-12-13-84.md) |
| [Lov om omdanning av statens jernbanetrafikkselskap (NSB BA) og statens postselsk](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2002-06-21-43.md) | Lov om NSB AS og Posten Norge AS | 2002-06-21, 2002-07-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2002-06-21-43.md) |
| [Lov om overføring av ansvar for kollektivtransport](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2017-06-16-64.md) | Lov om overføring av ansvar for kollektivtransport | 2020-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2017-06-16-64.md) |
| [Lov om overføring av offentlige og private rettsforhold fra Statens vegvesen til](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2015-12-18-133.md) | Lov om Nye Veier AS | 2016-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2015-12-18-133.md) |
| [Lov om overføring av rettigheter og forpliktelser ved omklassifisering av veg et](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2009-06-19-109.md) | Lov om omklassifisering av veg | 2009-06-19, 2010-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2009-06-19-109.md) |
| [Lov om posttjenester (postloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2015-09-04-91.md) | Postloven | 2016-01-01, 2024-04-19 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2015-09-04-91.md) |
| [Lov om reservasjonssystemer for flyreiser mv.](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2016-09-09-80.md) | Lov om reservasjonssystemer for flyreiser mv. | 2016-09-09 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2016-09-09-80.md) |
| [Lov om taubaner (taubaneloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2017-05-22-29.md) | Taubaneloven | 2017-07-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2017-05-22-29.md) |
| [Lov om utleie av små elektriske kjøretøy på offentlig grunn](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2021-06-18-139.md) | Lov om utleie av små elektriske kjøretøy på offentlig grunn | 2021-06-18 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2021-06-18-139.md) |
| [Lov om utprøving av selvkjørende kjøretøy](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2017-12-15-112.md) | Lov om utprøving av selvkjørende kjøretøy | 2018-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2017-12-15-112.md) |
| [Lov om varsling, rapportering og undersøkelse av jernbaneulykker og jernbanehend](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2005-06-03-34.md) | Jernbaneundersøkelsesloven | 2005-06-03 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2005-06-03-34.md) |
| [Lov om vegar (veglova)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1963-06-21-23.md) | Veglova – vegl | 1964-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1963-06-21-23.md) |
| [Lov om vegtrafikk (vegtrafikkloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1965-06-18-4.md) | Vegtrafikkloven – vtrl | 1965-07-01, 1967-04-23 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1965-06-18-4.md) |
| [Lov om yrkestransport med motorvogn og fartøy (yrkestransportlova)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2002-06-21-45.md) | Yrkestransportlova | 2003-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2002-06-21-45.md) |
